title: beskid_nexus working in production
description:
Deployable nexus stack: gitnexus serve on 8452, runtime catalog/OAuth/analyze, green CI for Ladybug native and Docker, hub registration, and Coolify volume for GITNEXUS_HOME.

## Provenance
- **Catalog cutoff:** [`aaddd32`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/aaddd32) → [`ee88edf`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/ee88edf) on **beskid** (2026-05-26 – 2026-06-07)
- **Anchor commit:** [`72698c7`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/72698c7)

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4 (Platform services, auth, and delivery tooling)
- **Status:** In progress — submodule, green CI, and hub entry landed; production gitnexus serve smoke backlog
- **Workstreams:** `nexus`
